Cgv.title: Terms and conditions of sale
Cgv.objText: These general terms and conditions of sale govern the contractual relationship between NEONZART and its customers for the purchase of LED neon signs, ready-to-buy or custom-made.
Cgv.ordersText: Any custom order is subject to prior validation of the design by the customer via the online configurator. No production begins before explicit confirmation of the final rendering.
Cgv.paymentText: No online payment is required to place an order. For catalog signs, payment is made in full, in cash, on delivery. For custom signs, a 30% deposit of the total price must be paid before production starts; the remaining balance is paid on delivery.
Cgv.deliveryText: Delivery times are given for information purposes and may vary depending on destination and manufacturing complexity.
Cgv.withdrawalText: In accordance with applicable regulations, the right of withdrawal does not apply to custom-made products.

MentionsLegales.title: Legal notice
MentionsLegales.publisherText: This site is published by NEONZART, a workshop specializing in the manufacture of LED neon signs. For any question regarding the publisher's legal identification (legal form, business registration number, registered office), please contact us via our contact form.
MentionsLegales.directorText: Publication of this site is managed by the NEONZART team, reachable via the contact form.
MentionsLegales.hostingText: The site is hosted by a third-party cloud hosting provider (Render Services, Inc. — render.com). The database is hosted by MongoDB Atlas.
MentionsLegales.ipText: All elements of this site (text, visuals, logo, design) are protected by intellectual property law and remain the property of NEONZART unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction without prior authorization is prohibited.
MentionsLegales.liabilityText: NEONZART strives to ensure the accuracy of the information published on the site but cannot be held liable for errors, omissions, or temporary unavailability of the service.

Confidentialite.title: Privacy policy
Confidentialite.collectText: We collect the data you provide directly: name, contact details (email, phone), delivery address, and the content of the designs you create in the customization workshop (text, colors, dimensions, reference images).
Confidentialite.useText: This data is used to process your orders, provide customer support, respond to your contact requests, and improve our services. It is never used for marketing purposes without your consent.
Confidentialite.shareText: Your data is never sold or rented to third parties. It may be shared with service providers strictly necessary for order fulfillment (delivery, technical hosting).
Confidentialite.retentionText: Your data is kept for as long as necessary to process your order and comply with our legal obligations, then deleted or anonymized.
Confidentialite.rightsText: You have the right to access, rectify, and delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us via our contact form.
Confidentialite.securityText: We implement reasonable technical measures (encrypted connection, restricted access) to protect your data from unauthorized access.

Cgu.title: Terms of use
Cgu.purposeText: These terms of use govern access to and use of the NEONZART site, independently of the terms and conditions of sale applicable to purchases.
Cgu.accessText: The site is freely accessible to any user with internet access. Some features (order tracking, order history) require creating an account.
Cgu.accountText: The user is responsible for keeping their login credentials confidential and for any activity carried out from their account.
Cgu.contentText: By using the customization workshop, you guarantee that you hold the necessary rights to the text, logos, or images you upload, and you agree not to submit unlawful content or content infringing on third-party rights.
Cgu.ipText: The site, its structure, and its content are protected by intellectual property law. Any unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.
Cgu.changesText: NEONZART reserves the right to modify these terms of use at any time. The applicable terms are those in effect at the time of your visit to the site.

Cookies.title: Cookie policy
Cookies.whatText: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device while browsing, used to remember certain information from one visit to the next.
Cookies.typesText: The site only uses cookies essential to the operation of the service: keeping you signed in to your account, remembering your language and display preference (light/dark theme). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.
Cookies.purposeText: These essential cookies do not require prior consent and cannot be disabled without affecting the proper functioning of the site.
Cookies.managementText: You can configure your browser at any time to refuse cookies, keeping in mind that some site features (staying signed in to your account) may then stop working properly.

items.question: What is the manufacturing time for a custom sign?
items.answer: Allow generally 7 to 14 business days between design validation and shipping.

items.question: What is the maximum size for a custom sign?
items.answer: Custom signs are limited to 90cm in width and 90cm in height.

items.question: What happens if my design has collisions?
items.answer: The configurator automatically detects areas where two neon tubes would be too close and suggests adjustments before you confirm the order.

items.question: Do you deliver outside Algeria?
items.answer: Yes, international delivery is available via carrier; delivery times vary by destination.

snapPanel.title: Magnetic snap settings
snapPanel.sensitivityHint: Higher = more points (wider strokes detected as trace)

selection.title: Selected object ({type})
selection.blinkHint: Blink enabled — adds a multi-zone controller (+{price} {currency}) to the quote.
selection.resizeHint: To resize precisely, drag the blue squares at the corners (or endpoints for lines)

canvas.dimensions: Dimensions: {w} × {h} cm | Grid: 10cm × 10cm | Neon width: {tube} cm

instructions.title: Instructions:
instructions.selectText: click an element to select it, move it. Drag the blue squares to resize.
instructions.lineText: click to set the starting point, then click again for the end point.
instructions.shapesText: rectangle = perimeter | circle = circumference | line = length — all counted in the price!
instructions.dayNightText: see your sign switched off (day) or lit up (night).
instructions.shortcutsText: Ctrl+Z undo | Ctrl+Y redo | Ctrl+D duplicate | Arrow keys move (Shift = 1 cm) | Delete remove | Esc deselect.

errors.confirmClearAll: Are you sure you want to clear everything?
